block_03: As a special treat during long holidays for our Thai traders, IQ Option are pleased to announce the “THAI THAI Tournament” which is available only to Thai customers.
block_04: We challenge you to use all your strategies and prove who is the best trader in Thailand. The top 15 traders will share a Prize pool of 3000 dollars. The tournament will take place from 24 October - 07 November 2022! 🇹🇭
